description: Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad copy. The original content type for this engine. Fields match the canonical ad-schema.json format.

primary_text.description: Main body copy above the creative in Meta feed placements.

headline.description: Bold headline below the creative image/video.

description.description: Secondary text below the headline. Optional.

cta.description: Platform CTA button text (e.g., Learn More, Sign Up, Shop Now).
